summary: Backend-only test pass for new YouTube auto-fetch, Resend digest, and Gemini Nano Banana thumbnail-gen endpoints. 23 new tests added + 13 existing regression tests = 36/36 passing.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 1000+ lines — should be split into routers (auth, settings, videos, analytics, integrations) for maintainability.
send_digest_now: uses 'from: onboarding@resend.dev' which is Resend's sandbox/test domain — will only deliver to verified emails in production. Make the from-address configurable per user/env.
sync_youtube: any YouTube API failure (quota, invalid key, network) is collapsed into a generic 500. Consider distinguishing 401/403/quota cases for clearer UX.
_extract_video_id regex 'v=' is loose and would match 'rev=...' patterns. Use a stricter pattern like '[?&]v=([A-Za-z0-9_-]{11})'.
generate_thumbnail uploads to object storage; on any failure between image gen and DB insert there is no cleanup of partial state.

chat_stream still uses asyncio.new_event_loop() inside a generator to persist assistant message — fragile and can fail silently; use motor with run_until_complete in a thread or background task instead.
CORS allow_origins=['*'] together with allow_credentials=True is invalid per spec — browsers will reject credentialed requests.
seed_data_creation: Tests created TEST_ prefixed videos that were cleaned up via fixture teardown. user_settings rows for digest were toggled off after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 features requested were verified: (1) YouTube key save/get/delete encrypted [PASS], (2) Resend key save/get/delete encrypted [PASS], (3) Digest config GET/POST with email-required validation [PASS], (4) youtube/sync returns 400 when no key + 400 when no URL + 404 when video missing [PASS], (5) thumbnail/generate returns 404 when video missing — NOT called with real LLM key per instructions [PASS], (6) digest/send-now returns 400 when no resend key [PASS], (7) GET /settings/keys/{invalid_type} returns 400 [PASS], (8) Existing endpoints (auth/ideas/videos/analytics/affiliates/dashboard/anthropic-key) all still 200 [PASS]. URL parser tested against all 3 formats: youtu.be, watch?v=, /shorts/ — all parsed correctly. No real YouTube/Resend/Gemini calls made.
